note: Tables default to Single/Size=4 borders on all sides. Length props use twips (raw int) or unit-qualified. Data can be seeded via 'data' (semicolon rows, comma cells) or per-cell 'r{R}c{C}' props.

data.description: inline CSV-ish data ('H1,H2;R1C1,R1C2') or CSV file/URL/data-URI resolvable by FileSource.

colwidths.description: comma-separated per-column widths in twips. Aliases: colWidths.
colwidths.readback: comma-separated column widths in OOXML units

direction.description: Reading direction (Arabic / Hebrew). 'rtl' writes <w:bidiVisual/> on tblPr (mirrors column order); 'ltr' clears it. Distinct from per-cell textDirection.
direction.readback: rtl when set, key absent otherwise

width.description: table width in twips (Dxa) or percent ('50%' → Pct).

padding.description: default cell padding (all four sides) in twips.

border.all.description: set top/bottom/left/right AND inside horizontal/vertical borders at once. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. SIZE is in 1/8 pt units (4 = 0.5pt). Aliases: border. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).

border.top.description: outer top border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).
border.top.readback: style name under 'border.top'; size under 'border.top.sz'; color under 'border.top.color'; space under 'border.top.space' (4 separate keys, not a compound string)

border.bottom.description: outer bottom border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).
border.bottom.readback: style name under 'border.bottom'; size under 'border.bottom.sz'; color under 'border.bottom.color'; space under 'border.bottom.space' (4 separate keys, not a compound string)

border.left.description: outer left border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).
border.left.readback: style name under 'border.left'; size under 'border.left.sz'; color under 'border.left.color'; space under 'border.left.space' (4 separate keys, not a compound string)

border.right.description: outer right border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).
border.right.readback: style name under 'border.right'; size under 'border.right.sz'; color under 'border.right.color'; space under 'border.right.space' (4 separate keys, not a compound string)

border.horizontal.description: inside horizontal borders (between rows). Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Alias: border.insideH. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).

border.vertical.description: inside vertical borders (between columns). Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Alias: border.insideV. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).
